chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-649 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 8694/2024 07.08.2024 Mr. Abdul Rehman Raza Abbasi advocate for applicant. ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J Through this Criminal Miscellaneous Application the applicant has challenged the order dated 08.08.2023 passed by Additional Sessions Judge-II Kotri, whereby application of applicant u/s 22-A 6(i) Cr.P.C was dismissed. 2. Heard learned counsel for the applicant and perused the impugned order. Impugned order reflects that the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace mainly assigning the reasons in para No.10 has dismissed the application which is reproduced as under: “From the material, in the shape of documents produced by the learned counsel for the proposed accused along with statement and copy of plaint of suit, whatsapp chatting between the parties, screen shot of payment of some amount (suppressed by the applicant in his application, prima facie shows that the cheque in question was issued to meet in future obligation. Mere issuance of cheque and same having been dishonored being actus- reus would not be able to attract the provision of section 489-F PPC. Therefore, the instant application merits no consideration and is hereby dismissed.” 3. In view of above, no illegality or irregularity is found in the impugned order which is maintained. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with pending application is dismissed. JUDGE Ali Haider 2
